Cell.Data: The DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES column contains info on what text between { } signs means (if applicable). It usually stands for either a numeric value, or a numeric value with an icon. Text between [ ] signs stands for a certain type of icon.
Skill tree header. VoidTech is an in-game secret tech.

On death, the hero loses all [abilityblue][essencecharge/]Essence Charges[/abilityblue] and returns to life with {firstHealAmount}[hp/] plus an additional {secondHealAmount}[hp/] for each Essence Charge lost. This can only occur once per battle.

W chwili śmierci bohater traci wszystkie [abilityblue][essencecharge/]ładunki esencji[/abilityblue] i wraca do życia z {firstHealAmount}[hp/] oraz otrzymuje dodatkowo {secondHealAmount}[hp/] za każdy utracony ładunek esencji. Może do tego dojść tylko raz na bitwę.
Essence Charges are like 'lifeforce' that is stolen from enemies. These Essence Charges can be spent as a resource for some abilities.
The hero gains the 'Harvest Essence' defense mode, allowing them to regenerate {essenceAmount}[abilityblue][essencecharge/]Essence Charge[/abilityblue], if they don't have one already, when entered.

Bohater zyskuje tryb obronny o nazwie „Żniwa esencji” umożliwiający zregenerowanie {essenceAmount}[abilityblue][essencecharge/]ładunków esencji[/abilityblue], jeśli nie ma żadnego przy uaktywnieniu tego trybu.
A defense mode is a special stance a unit can enter in lieu of attacking, that makes their defense stronger on top of additional effects
The hero gains {shieldAmount}[shield/] for each [abilityblue][essencecharge/]Essence Charge[/abilityblue] they are carrying.
Bohater zyskuje {shieldAmount}[shield/] za każdy posiadany [abilityblue][essencecharge/]ładunek esencji[/abilityblue].
This hero gains {EssenceChance}[strengthEntropy/] strength chance to apply [abilityred]Energy Drain[/abilityred] on all attacks.[br/][br/]This does not stack with any other essence drain effects.

Ten bohater zyskuje szansę (siła {EssenceChance}[strengthEntropy/]) dodania [abilityred]wyssania energii[/abilityred] do każdego ataku.[br/][br/]Nie sumuje się to z innymi efektami wysysającymi esencję.

Text between {} should NOT be localized as they are numerical values in-game. Text between [] should NOT be localized as they are either icons or text formatting
EXAMPLE: "Hero gains {PersonaAccDmg} increased damage and accuracy " looks in-game like "Hero gains +5 increased damage and accuracy"
